name: Apple Pie with Port with Cheddar Cheese Crust
recipeIngredient: 8 medium Cooking apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a large saucepan.
2. Stir in apple juice, port, butter, and lemon peel.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils.
4. Add apples and cook gently until barely tender.
5. To make Cheddar Cheese crust:
a. Mix flour, salt, and shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
b. Stir in cheese.
c. Gradually add water and mix lightly with a fork to form dough.
6. Divide the pastry into halves.
7. Roll out one half to fit a 9-inch pie pan.
8. Roll out the second half of the pastry and cut into 10 (1/2-inch) strips.
9. Spoon the filling into the pastry-lined pan.
10. Weave the pastry strips across the filling to make a lattice top.
11. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 45 minutes, or until done. Serve warm.
